all.en: This memorandum reports the findings of the internal audit conducted in March.
all.zh: 本備忘錄報告三月份進行之內部稽核的發現結果。

all.en: The audit focused on controls within the accounts payable and procurement cycles.
all.zh: 稽核重點為應付帳款與採購循環內的控制作業。

all.en: Fieldwork was performed at the headquarters and at two regional shared service centers.
all.zh: 現場稽核於總部及兩個區域共享服務中心執行。

all.en: A risk-based sampling approach was applied to transactions above defined thresholds.
all.zh: 對高於既定門檻的交易採用風險為基礎的抽樣方法。

all.en: Overall, the control environment was assessed as satisfactory with room for improvement.
all.zh: 整體而言，控制環境評估為令人滿意，仍有改進空間。

all.en: Three high-risk findings and four medium-risk findings were identified during the review.
all.zh: 本次審查共辨識出三項高風險發現與四項中風險發現。

all.en: Finding one relates to weaknesses in vendor master data maintenance procedures.
all.zh: 發現一涉及供應商主檔資料維護程序的薄弱之處。

all.en: Several inactive vendors had not been blocked within the required timeframe.
all.zh: 數家不再合作的供應商未在規定時間內封鎖。

all.en: Finding two highlights insufficient segregation of duties in the invoice approval workflow.
all.zh: 發現二指出發票核准流程中職務分工不足。

all.en: Two users could both create and approve payments above 50,000 dollars.
all.zh: 兩名使用者同時擁有建立及核准逾五萬美元付款的權限。

all.en: Finding three concerns inadequate documentation supporting urgent purchase orders.
all.zh: 發現三涉及緊急採購單支持文件不足。

all.en: Roughly 18 percent of sampled urgent orders lacked the required justification memo.
all.zh: 抽樣的緊急訂單中約百分之十八缺少必要的事由說明備忘錄。

all.en: Medium-risk items include delayed reconciliations and inconsistent contract filing practices.
all.zh: 中風險項目包括對帳延遲與合約歸檔實務不一致。

all.en: No indications of fraud or intentional misconduct were detected during testing.
all.zh: 測試過程中未發現舞弊或故意不當行為的跡象。

all.en: Management has responded constructively to each observation raised by the audit team.
all.zh: 管理層對稽核團隊提出的每項觀察均作出建設性回應。

all.en: Action plans with clear owners and target dates have been agreed for all findings.
all.zh: 已就所有發現議定具明確負責人及目標日期的行動計畫。

all.en: Remediation for high-risk findings is expected to be completed within 90 days.
all.zh: 高風險發現的補救預計於九十天內完成。

all.en: Medium-risk items will be closed in the following six months.
all.zh: 中風險項目將於後續六個月內結案。

all.en: Internal audit will perform follow-up validation testing in the fourth quarter.
all.zh: 內部稽核將於第四季執行後續驗證測試。

all.en: Progress will be reported quarterly to the audit committee of the board.
all.zh: 進度將每季向董事會稽核委員會回報。

all.en: Process owners are encouraged to leverage automation to strengthen long-term controls.
all.zh: 鼓勵流程負責人善用自動化以強化長期控制。

all.en: Training refreshers will be scheduled for staff involved in procurement transactions.
all.zh: 將為涉及採購交易的員工排定教育訓練複習課程。

all.en: We thank management and operational teams for their cooperation throughout the audit.
all.zh: 感謝管理層與營運團隊在整個稽核期間的配合。

all.en: The full audit report and management response have been distributed to designated leaders.
all.zh: 完整稽核報告與管理層回應已分送指定主管。

all.en: Future audits will incorporate data analytics to enable broader transaction coverage and trend detection.
all.zh: 未來稽核將納入資料分析，以擴大交易覆蓋率並偵測趨勢。

all.en: A continuous monitoring dashboard is being developed to flag exceptions in real time.
all.zh: 正在開發持續監控儀表板，以即時標示例外狀況。

all.en: Internal audit will coordinate with the compliance function on overlapping risk areas.
all.zh: 內部稽核將與法規遵循部門協調重疊的風險領域。

all.en: An anonymous reporting channel will be promoted to encourage early issue identification.
all.zh: 將推廣匿名通報管道，以鼓勵早期辨識議題。

all.en: Root cause analysis sessions will be facilitated with each business unit during remediation.
all.zh: 補救期間將與各業務單位主持根本原因分析會議。

all.en: Lessons learned will be shared in the next leadership forum to drive cross-functional awareness.
all.zh: 下次領導論壇將分享經驗教訓，以促進跨部門認知。

all.en: The next audit cycle will examine inventory management and revenue recognition controls.
all.zh: 下一稽核週期將檢視存貨管理及收入認列控制。

all.en: External auditors have been briefed on the findings to support their year-end planning.
all.zh: 外部稽核師已就本次發現獲得簡報，以支持其年終規劃。

all.en: We remain committed to transparent reporting and continuous improvement of internal controls.
all.zh: 我們持續致力於透明的報告及內部控制的持續改善。

all.en: Any questions regarding this memorandum should be directed to the chief audit executive.
all.zh: 如對本備忘錄有任何疑問，請洽稽核長。

all.en: Process mapping workshops will be held with stakeholders to identify hidden control gaps.
all.zh: 將與利害關係人舉辦流程地圖工作坊以辨識隱藏的控制缺口。

all.en: Internal audit will partner with information technology on access right recertification.
all.zh: 內部稽核將與資訊科技部門合作辦理存取權限再認證。

all.en: A revised vendor onboarding checklist will be issued before the end of the second quarter.
all.zh: 修訂版供應商引進檢核表將於第二季結束前發布。

all.en: Three-way match exceptions will now be reviewed weekly by accounts payable supervisors.
all.zh: 三方對單例外項目現將由應付帳款主管每週審查。

all.en: Training attendance records will be tracked centrally to demonstrate compliance.
all.zh: 訓練出席紀錄將集中追蹤以證明合規性。

all.en: An updated authority matrix has been circulated to all department heads for sign-off.
all.zh: 更新後的職權矩陣已分送各部門主管簽核。

all.en: Sample size for the next audit will increase by 30 percent to improve confidence.
all.zh: 下次稽核的抽樣量將增加百分之三十以提升信心水準。

all.en: Internal audit has joined the digital transformation steering committee in an advisory role.
all.zh: 內部稽核已以顧問身分加入數位轉型指導委員會。

all.en: External benchmarking confirms our control maturity is on par with industry peers.
all.zh: 外部標竿比較確認我方控制成熟度與同業相當。

all.en: We extend our appreciation to the audit committee for its ongoing oversight and support.
all.zh: 感謝稽核委員會持續的監督與支持。
